name: Process Dump via Rundll32 and Comsvcs
description: Detects the use of `rundll32.exe` to dump the LSASS process using `comsvcs.dll`. This technique is a common method for adversaries to obtain credentials. Dumping LSASS is a highly suspicious activity and a strong indicator of compromise.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'rundll32.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the rundll32.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute rundll32.exe, including 'comsvcs.dll,#24' or 'comsvcs.dll,MiniDump'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which rundll32.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
